title: spiranthera turpethum
intro: Spiranthera turpethum, also known as the yellow turpeth, is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae, native to the tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include laxative, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Spiranthera turpethum include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various gastrointestinal disorders. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in Ayurvedic medicine, typically in the form of powder or decoction, to treat a range of health issues.
